nasb.text: He used to go annually on circuit to Bethel and Gilgal and Mizpah, and he judged Israel in all these places.

esv.text: And he went on a circuit year by year to Bethel, Gilgal, and Mizpah. And he judged Israel in all these places.

cnv.text: 他每年都巡迴伯特利、吉甲和米斯巴，在這些地方治理以色列人。

ccb.text: 他每年都到伯利恒、吉甲、米斯巴各地巡回，审理以色列人的案件。
